stemHtml: What is the effect of the tropopause inversion on the formation of clouds within the troposphere?

options.a: If the updrafts are strong enough, they can break through the inversion, thus producing a noctilucent cloud.
options.b: The inversion will stop any further convection and the released energy will lead to severe hail storms.
options.c: A cloud, reaching the inversion, may stop its ascent and the upper winds may produce an anvil shape.
options.d: If the inversion is at a very low altitude, the blocking of the updraft will lead to the formation of a supercell thunderstorm.
